frontmatter.title: Foundations
frontmatter.description: Core concepts, installation, and initial setup for LoongClaw

html:
Foundations

Welcome to the Foundations section of the LoongClaw documentation. This section covers the essential knowledge you need to get LoongClaw up and running on your system.

In this section:

  • Getting Started: Install, configure, and run LoongClaw.
  • Quick Start: Your first 5 minutes with LoongClaw.
  • CLI Reference: Master the LoongClaw command-line interface.
  • Configuration: Understand how to customize LoongClaw settings.
